summary: Backend-only Task 11 validation completed successfully. Metric validation suite structure, construct/discrimination checks, evaluator reuse, determinism, and full regression are all green.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for Task 11 scope.
critical_code_review_comments: Validation helpers in aceb/eval/validation.py correctly reuse evaluate_core_metrics() rather than duplicating PCM/CDL/PR logic.
Each check includes structured details with case_1/case_2 (or explicit comparison cases), expected_relation, observed_relation, and computed metric values (PCM, CDL, PR, accuracy).

Construct/discrimination intent is preserved in fixed trajectories: PCM increases with stronger pre-switch correctness, CDL requires window evidence (single lucky correct does not trigger), and PR remains specific to obsolete-policy post-switch errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests/test_metric_validation.py -v --tb=short and pytest /app/tests -v --tb=short with JUnit outputs in /app/test_reports/pytest/. All checks passed deterministically. NO MOCKED APIs used.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration. Validation suite behavior aligns with requested Task 11 constraints and remains regression-safe.
